data.body: Baseline mutation run complete (5-module core, 3796 mutants, 22.9 mut/s). Per-module mapped scores: signing 99.2% (3 survivors, all equivalent), reducer/_processors 97.3% (19 survivors), next_batch 62.7% (236 survivors), gates 100% / validate 100% over mapped (large no-tests counts because their interface tests drive via subprocess, coverage-blind). Root cause of next_batch survivors: the only IN-PROCESS test (test_library_and_mcp_shape) asserts ~nothing (batch_size==2 + schema). Remediating: rich in-process behavioral tests for compute/to_json_dict (output keys+values) and reducer REVERT/BRIDGE_ALERT/VERIFY_COMMANDS record fields.
